revision.text: * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation. [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation. [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation. [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation. [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation. [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

[[Category:Documentation see also templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Foo_other_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Foo_other_see_also for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> * {{tl|Sandbox other}} — Distinguishes between the /sandbox subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Testcases other}} — Distinguishes between the /testcases subpages and the root template page and other subpages. * {{tl|Template other}} — Distinguishes between pages in the template namespace and other namespaces. * {{tl|When on basepage}} — Distinguishes between the root template page and subpages, without special consideration in the mainspace. * {{tl|Subpage other}} — Distinguisheds between the root page and subpages (any subpage), classifying pagenames in the mainspace with a slash as being the root page.<noinclude> {{Documentation|content= List of "Foo other" templates for inclusion in "See also" section of documentation.
